mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM supplier
AND supplier_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND contact LIKE CONCAT('%', #{contact}, '%')
ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM supplier
AND supplier_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND contact LIKE CONCAT('%', #{contact}, '%')
SELECT * FROM supplier ORDER BY supplier_name
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO supplier(supplier_name, contact, phone, address, remark) VALUES(#{supplierName}, #{contact}, #{phone}, #{address}, #{remark})
mapper.update: UPDATE supplier SET supplier_name = #{supplierName}, contact = #{contact}, phone = #{phone}, address = #{address}, remark = #{remark} WHERE supplier_id = #{supplierId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM purchase_order WHERE supplier_id = #{supplierId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM supplier WHERE YEAR(create_time) = YEAR(CURDATE()) AND MONTH(create_time) = MONTH(CURDATE())
